calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Michael Lieberman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Irene M. lieberman dba The Kenmore.
No appearance by the Defendant: Frank Alan Reynolds.
Plaintiff's witness: Kelly LeDrew, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Frank Alan Reynolds as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1570 Sutter St., #314, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $2,753.00
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $132.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.
April 12, 2005, Judgment signed signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-04-2005 Continued To Apr-11-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2005 Off Calendar
